Atty. Steven A. Scordalakis, Esq. of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP (Tel: 916-702-3221) for Defendant/Cross-Complainant Open Top Sight Seeing, LLC;
Atty. Edmund T. Wang, Esq. of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3857) for Cross-Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT OPEN TOP SIGHTSEEING SAN FRANCISCO, LLC's Motion To Compel The City And County Of San Franciscos Further Response To Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two; And Production Of Responsive Documents.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted. Cross-Complainant Open Top Sightseeing San Francisco, LLC's motion to compel is granted in part and denied in part as set forth in the report and recommendation.

Order signed.
